headline: GE Vernova's Gas Nuclear Project Tests High Expectations And Rich Valuation
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) and Blue Energy announced a major U.S. collaboration to design a combined nuclear and natural gas power plant. The project pairs GE Vernova Hitachi Nuclear Energy's BWRX-300 small modular reactor with modern gas turbines in a single site. The partners plan to use advanced offsite construction and modularization methods aimed at faster delivery and lower project complexity. The gas plus nuclear concept is targeted at rising electricity needs from AI data centers and new...

headline: GEV Surges 36.1% in 3 Months: Is the Stock Worth Betting on Now?
summary: GE Vernova gains from rising AI-driven power demand, strong orders and global project wins, but tariff costs and premium valuation may temper appeal.

headline: GE Vernova (GEV): Argus Raises Its Target to $1,300 After a Blowout Quarter
summary: GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) is one of the best uranium stocks to buy according to Wall Street analysts. On April 27, Argus analyst John Eade raised his price target on GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) from $800 to $1,300, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. The upgrade came just days after GE Vernova reported […]
